title: How to Submit an IT Support Ticket
text:
Q: How do I submit an IT support ticket and what information should I include?
A: To submit an IT support ticket, please follow these steps: 

Step 1: Access the IT support portal. You can do this by navigating to the company intranet and clicking on the 'IT Support' link. 

Step 2: Click on the 'Submit a Ticket' button. 

Step 3: Fill out the ticket form with the required information. Make sure to include the following details: 
- A clear and concise title for your issue. 
- A detailed description of the problem you are experiencing, including any error messages. 
- The urgency of the issue (Low, Medium, High). 
- Your contact information (email and phone number). 
- The device you are using (e.g., laptop, desktop) and its operating system (Windows or macOS). 

Step 4: If applicable, attach any relevant screenshots or files that may help in diagnosing the issue. 

Step 5: Review your submission for accuracy and completeness. 

Step 6: Click the 'Submit' button to send your ticket. 

You will receive a confirmation email with a ticket number for tracking purposes. If you have any questions or need assistance while submitting your ticket, please reach out to the IT helpdesk directly.
